revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.comment: Created page with "<gallery> File:Agemizo_Tenjinzuka_Kofun,_3D-P.jpg|thumb|[[Agemizo Tenjinzuka Kofun]] – A keyhole-shaped kofun with historical significance. Located in [[Prefecture]], Japan. File:Akaizuka_Kofun,_3D-P.jpg|thumb|[[Akaizuka Kofun]] – A mound tomb featuring unique burial techniques. Found in [[Region]], Japan. File:Akasaka_Tennozan_Kofun,_3D-P.jpg|thumb|[[Akasaka Tennozan Kofun]] – Known for its large size and archaeological importance. Located in [[Prefecture]], Japan..."
revision.text: <gallery> File:Agemizo_Tenjinzuka_Kofun,_3D-P.jpg|thumb|[[Agemizo Tenjinzuka Kofun]] – A keyhole-shaped kofun with historical significance. Located in [[Prefecture]], Japan. File:Akaizuka_Kofun,_3D-P.jpg|thumb|[[Akaizuka Kofun]] – A mound tomb featuring unique burial techniques. Found in [[Region]], Japan. File:Akasaka_Tennozan_Kofun,_3D-P.jpg|thumb|[[Akasaka Tennozan Kofun]] – Known for its large size and archaeological importance. Located in [[Prefecture]], Japan. File:Akidono_Minami_Kofun,_3D-P.jpg|thumb|[[Akidono Minami Kofun]] – A circular kofun notable for its historic relics. Located in [[Prefecture]], Japan. File:Amazuka_Kofun,_sekishitsu-2,_3D-P.jpg|thumb|[[Amazuka Kofun]] – Features a stone burial chamber and unique structural elements. Found in [[Region]], Japan. File:Asakura_Kofun,_3D-P.jpg|thumb|[[Asakura Kofun]] – A kofun with a keyhole shape, surrounded by a moat. Located in [[Prefecture]], Japan. File:Atagozuka_Kofun_(Shimada),_3D-P.jpg|thumb|[[Atagozuka Kofun (Shimada)]] – Famous for its terraced design and artifacts. Located in [[Shimada City]], Japan. File:Atagozuka_Kofun_(Yao),_3D-P.jpg|thumb|[[Atagozuka Kofun (Yao)]] – A small kofun noted for its historical inscriptions. Found in [[Yao City]], Japan. File:Baikihira_Kofun,_3D-P.jpg|thumb|[[Baikihira Kofun]] – A kofun from the mid-Kofun period. Located in [[Prefecture]], Japan. File:Bakuya_Kofun,_3D-P.jpg|thumb|[[Bakuya Kofun]] – Features a keyhole shape and historically significant relics. Found in [[Region]], Japan. ... File:Yubunesaka_Kofun_Group-2,_3D-P.jpg|thumb|[[Yubunesaka Kofun Group]] – A group of kofun with diverse burial styles. Located in [[Prefecture]], Japan. File:Ziigazuka_Kofun,_3D-P.jpg|thumb|[[Ziigazuka Kofun]] – A kofun featuring a circular design and notable artifacts. Found in [[Region]], Japan. </gallery>
